briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to Consider Statutory Rights-of-Way at Two City-Owned Sites
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on granting statutory rights-of-way (SRWs) — legal access strips on city-owned land — at 7950 Pandora St. and 1200 Gaglardi Way near Simon Fraser University. These proposed SRWs would allow specific, defined portions of those properties to be used for access or utility purposes.
briefs.action_required: Monitor the Burnaby Council meeting decision if your business operates near 7950 Pandora St. or 1200 Gaglardi Way.
